# t4o_workload_types (Data Source)

Lists available TrilioVault workload types (Parallel, Serial).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `workload_types` (Attributes List) List of workload types. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workload_types))

<a id="nestedatt--workload_types"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workload_types`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) Workload type UUID.
- `is_public` (Boolean)
- `name` (String) Type name (e.g. Parallel, Serial).
